global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a clear focus on trip booking.
global.main_message: Promoting affordable trip bookings through NomadLayer.

elements.label: NomadLayer logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'NomadLayer' in a clean font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Trip booking message
elements.description: A bold, prominent text stating 'Book your next trip' in a large font, centered in the ad.

elements.label: $4.99 price tag
elements.description: A highlighted price of '$4.99' in a slightly smaller font, positioned below the main message.

elements.label: Special fares note
elements.description: A smaller text reading 'Special fares today' in a subtle font, located just below the price.

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Shop now' in a bold font, designed to attract clicks, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: Abstract shapes in the background, including circles and rectangles, adding visual interest without distracting from the text.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape, possibly decorative, located towards the center of the ad.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: Another small circular shape, similar to the previous one, positioned near the center of the ad.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: A solid green background that fills the entire ad space, providing a vibrant and inviting atmosphere.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip $4.99 Shop now

elements.label: Ad headline
elements.description: The headline 'NomadLayer' is displayed prominently at the top, indicating the brand or service being advertised.

embedding_texts.global_text: NomadLayer, travel, native, bright and inviting, trip booking message, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main message in the center, with the price and special note below, and the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: NomadLayer, Book your next trip, $4.99, Special fares today, Shop now
